response.global_analysis:
1. Reference JSON Mismatch: The reference JSON identified the first song as 'Chronic', but the actual song performed is 'Phony' by Tsumiki. The reference lyrics were discarded, and the song was transcribed and translated manually.
2. Narration & Burnt-in Subs: The manga panel narration starting from 01:33 matches the vocal delivery exactly. The official burnt-in English subtitles were used as the primary guide for translation to maintain accuracy.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are locked tightly to vocal onset and offset, utilizing instantaneous transitions during rapid speech or song segments to avoid cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 奪い合う瞳 乾いた
subtitles.english: Clashing eyes, parched...

subtitles.original: 崩れた 貴方のせいで
subtitles.english: They crumbled all because of you.

subtitles.original: はやく はやく はやく はやく はやく はやく
subtitles.english: Hurry, hurry, hurry, hurry, hurry, hurry...

subtitles.original: ねえ、教えて
subtitles.english: Hey, tell me,

subtitles.original: 深い 深い 秘密の向こうへと
subtitles.english: beyond the deep, deep secret...

subtitles.original: antipathy world
subtitles.english: antipathy world.

subtitles.original: 不甲斐ない 日々を重ねた
subtitles.english: Overlapping these disappointing days,

subtitles.original: うつむいた 君のせいで
subtitles.english: all because of you hanging your head.

subtitles.original: はやく はやく はやく はやく はやく はやく
subtitles.english: Hurry, hurry, hurry, hurry, hurry, hurry...

subtitles.original: ねえ、教えて
subtitles.english: Hey, tell me,

subtitles.original: 甘い 甘い 嘘の向こうへと
subtitles.english: beyond the sweet, sweet lie...

subtitles.original: 白い光を見つめていると
subtitles.english: Staring into the white light...

subtitles.original: 急な痛みに襲われる
subtitles.english: ...a sudden pain washes over me.

subtitles.original: 僕が 私を 保っていられなくなること
subtitles.english: Losing my grip on who I am...

subtitles.original: それこそが この小さな楽器が証明している
subtitles.english: ...is what this small instrument proves.

subtitles.original: はじめに、安堵する君が見たい
subtitles.english: First, I want to see you relieved.

subtitles.original: つぎに、期待したい
subtitles.english: Next, I want to hope.

subtitles.original: この場所で戦いなど起こっていない。
subtitles.english: There was no major battle here.

subtitles.original: 少なくともこの世界線では...
subtitles.english: At least not in this timeline...

subtitles.original: だが探偵には分かっていた。彼女が見たものは決して夢ではないことを。
subtitles.english: But the detective knows what she saw was no dream.

subtitles.original: 心の中にはまだ殺戮の匂いが漂っている。
subtitles.english: The smell of the carnage still lingers in her mind.

subtitles.original: かつての彼女にまとわりついていた、あの匂い。
subtitles.english: It's a scent that was, at one time, so familiar to her.

subtitles.original: 探偵としての生活も今では順調だが、そうでなければあの匂いからは離れることができなかったでしょう。
subtitles.english: That stench would still linger on her if the detective's life didn't take a turn for the better.

subtitles.original: 今でも... あの頃の日々がリアルな夢のようにまとわりつく。
subtitles.english: Even now... her days felt more like the real dream.

subtitles.original: 終わるべくして終わったおとぎ話。
subtitles.english: A fairytale. Maybe one that deserved to end.

subtitles.original: どこまで行っても彼女は、生まれ持った本質から逃れることはできない。
subtitles.english: Because, at the end of the day, she can never run away from her nature.

subtitles.original: それでも今は違う。今の彼女には仲間がいる。
subtitles.english: But she's not just that anymore. She has friends to thank for that.

subtitles.original: それが、別の世界線の彼女とは違う点なのかもしれない。
subtitles.english: Maybe that was what separated her from the other version.

subtitles.original: もしかしたらあの子は、幸せに生きることのできた世界線があったのだろうかと、
subtitles.english: And, maybe... that version of herself just wanted a ray of hope,

subtitles.original: そんな一筋の希望を求めていたのだろうか。
subtitles.english: to know that there was one timeline where things worked out.

subtitles.original: そしてその幸せな世界線というのは、ここではないまた別の世界線のことかもしれない...
subtitles.english: Or perhaps this was never about the detective...

subtitles.original: 考えが頭を巡るものの、答えが出ることはない。
subtitles.english: so many thoughts run amok inside her head, but they're forever left unanswered.

subtitles.original: 何にせよ、探偵は自身の血塗られた過去を忘れることはないでしょう。
subtitles.english: Whatever the case, the detective won't forget her bloody past,

subtitles.original: しかしまた後戻りするつもりもない。彼女はこれからも仲間とともに進む。
subtitles.english: but she isn't going to revert to it either. She will continue to move forward with her friends,

subtitles.original: 望んだ結末を迎えられなかった別の自分たちのためににも。
subtitles.english: and for all the variants who didn't get their desired ending.

subtitles.original: 探偵アーニャ・メルフィッサは、明日に向かって生き続ける。
subtitles.english: The detective, Anya Melfissa, will keep on living for her own tomorrow.

subtitles.original: Anya Melfissa Birthday Live 2023! Woo! How did everyone like it? Oh my goodness!
subtitles.english: Anya Melfissa Birthday Live 2023! Woo! How did everyone like it? Oh my goodness!

subtitles.original: やっと今年も参りました、アーニャの誕生日です！いかがでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: Finally, this year has come! It's Anya's birthday! How did you all like it?

subtitles.original: This time, I tried to incorporate a little bit of story into my 3D birthday celebration, and I think it turned out pretty nice, you know?
subtitles.english: This time, I tried to incorporate a little bit of story into my 3D birthday celebration, and I think it turned out pretty nice, you know?

subtitles.original: You get story part and also live part, and I think it turned out pretty well!
subtitles.english: You get a story part and also a live part, and I think it turned out pretty well!

subtitles.original: And also, how was my new original song? Oh my goodness!
subtitles.english: And also, how was my new original song? Oh my goodness!

subtitles.original: How was my new original song? It was good, wasn't it? I hope you all liked it!
subtitles.english: How was my new original song? It was good, wasn't it? I hope you all liked it!

subtitles.original: 新曲もね、あの、歌わせていただきました。いかがでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: I also got to sing my new original song. How did you like it?
